chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE PEOPLE ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 35)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) نَحْنُ بَنُو هَاشِمٍ وَ شِيعَتُنَا الْعَرَبُ وَ سَائِرُ النَّاسِ الْأَعْرَابُ.

en.hubeali: H 14631 – From him, from Yahya Bin Al-Mubarak, from Abdullah Bin Jabalat, from Is’haq Bin Ammaar or someone else who said:
Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘Weasws are the Clan of Hashimas, and ourasws Shiites are the Arabs, and the rest of the people are Bedouins’.
en.sarwar: 183. From him, from Yahya Bin Al-Mubarak, from Abdullah Bin Jabalat, from Is’haq Bin Ammaar or someone else who said: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: ‘We (a.s.) are the Clan of Hashim (as), and our (a.s.) Shiites are the Arabs, and the rest of the people are Bedouins’.
